name.full: Public Filings Connector (SEC EDGAR, FMP, Daloopa)

description.short: Provides access to public company filings from SEC EDGAR, FMP, and Daloopa.
description.full: Provides access to public company filings from SEC EDGAR (raw filings, XBRL), Financial Modeling Prep (structured financials), and Daloopa (auto-extracted data).
